title: Review round 48: mls, hpke, auth, transport, messages, store, history
notes:
Maintainer risk: MEDIUM — Two correctness bugs in store.rs (advance_diversifier_to DEFERRED tx, try_set_nickname TOCTOU) affect relay database integrity. The HPKE, MLS, and auth code is well-structured with good test coverage. The main risk area is SQLite transaction discipline in store.rs where the BEGIN IMMEDIATE pattern is used inconsistently.
Confidence: 15% chance of missed bug. Uncertainty driven by: (1) did not read all of ws.rs GROUP_ADD/GROUP_SEND paths in detail, (2) MLS openmls library internals not audited — credential() behavior on StagedCommit not verified. Would raise confidence if: MLS test vectors from a second implementation were run, and if the DEFERRED-vs-IMMEDIATE SQLite test suite covered concurrent-reconnect scenarios.
